title: Abby AI Assistant
description: Abby is your AI research assistant powered by MedGemma with a ChromaDB vector knowledge base. The knowledge base contains 39,000+ documentation chunks that inform every response. Abby provides documentation-informed answers, per-user conversation memory that remembers your previous questions, a shared FAQ system where common questions get faster and better answers, and clinical reference context on medical pages.
tips: Abby adapts to the page you're on — ask context-specific questions for more relevant answers.
Your conversation history helps Abby give personalized answers over time.
Use the streaming chat for real-time responses as Abby generates her answer.
Abby can help with cohort design, vocabulary search, data quality, clinical analytics, and more.
Admins can trigger knowledge base updates from the ChromaDB management API.
